title: Product Compliance 001 Initiation of Self Attestation of Members Participants for F Y 2025 26
text:
NEED

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/2025-26/PD/001 26% June 2025

To,

All Members participating in various NPCI Products

Sub: Initiation of Self-Attestation of Members/Participants for F.Y. 2025-26
Dear Sir/Madam,

We refer to circular no. NPCI/2022-23/OC/PD/001 dated 7" September 2022 and NPCI/2023-
24/PD/005 dated 28'" December 2023 on adherence to NPCI guidelines by members/participants and
Self-Attestation. We also refer to the advisory no. NPCI/2025-26/PD/005 dated 16" April 2025 on
submission of Self-Attestation by Internal Audit or Compliance Function of the member/participant.

Self-Attestation is a process where members / participants submit status of compliance with respect
to NPCI guidelines. The Self-Attestation checklist is based on documents such as Procedural
Guidelines, Operating Circulars, Technical Specification Document, etc. Members / participants shall
submit Self-Attestation through NPCI’s PCOMP portal. This activity shall be on a periodic basis, such
as annually or as and when required.

This is to inform you that directives for Quarter (Q1) F.Y. 2025-26 are updated on the PCOMP portal
for Self-Attestation by members / participants.

Action for members / participants:

1. All Members / Participants to complete the Self-Attestation for Q1 F.Y. 25-26 by 31%' March
2026 for all applicable products.

2. For a few of the directives / circulars the members / participants need to complete the Self -
Attestation as per the specific date mentioned for respective directives.

Please note, any non-adherence to completion of Self-Attestation process and non-compliance
observed will be liable for proper appropriate actions and may further lead to penal actions by
Surveillance and Enforcement Team (S&E) as per circulars referred above.

Please make a note of the above information and disseminate the same to the concerned officials.

Yours Sincerely,

SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products

JOOIA, The Capital, B Wing, 10% Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.
T: +91 22 40009100 F: +91 22 40009101
contact@npci.org.in www.npci.org.in

CIN: U749S0MH2008NPLI189067
